items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tributes to the great social reformer and educationist, Mahatma Jyotiba Phule, on his birth anniversary
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tributes to the great social reformer and educationist, Mahatma Jyotiba Phule, on his birth anniversary Jyotiba Phule regarded education as the most effective medium for social reform He pioneered women's education and, by establishing the 'Satyashodhak Samaj', made a significant …
